input.prompt:

content.text:

- Task-matched skills (1): positioning-statement

- Fallbacks: none

[Post-Execution ROI]
- Time saved: ~4 hrs (joint deliverable, sum of contributors)

- Tokens: 70k (~$0.6 cost)
